state.initial_idea: Fix spacebar play/pause in compose view, auto-show clip properties during playback, add text designer for intros/exits/titles/sections, fix arrow key preview updates and playback-from-selected-frame, decide compose vs dedicated effects view, tests for all

codebase_context.spacebar: Global shortcut in useUndoRedo.ts toggles play/pause via Space key. Timeline.tsx has scoped keyboard handlers for arrows/J/K/L. Possible focus or event propagation issue in compose view.
codebase_context.properties_panel: PropertiesPanel.tsx conditionally renders SegmentProperties or SyncPointProperties based on selectedSegmentId/selectedSyncPointId in timeline-store. PlaybackPanel tracks activeSegmentId during playback but does NOT auto-select in store — gap identified.
codebase_context.playback: RAF-based usePlayhead hook with playheadEmitter event bus. VideoPlayer.tsx syncs play/pause/seek. PlaybackPanel finds active segment at current position.
codebase_context.arrow_keys: Timeline.tsx handles ArrowRight/Left for frame-by-frame (67ms at 15fps). Emits via playheadEmitter. May not properly trigger VideoPlayer seek update.
codebase_context.workspace_presets: 4 presets: recording, compose, script, export. Compose shows storyboard+playback+timeline+properties. Overlay track type exists in types but no UI.
codebase_context.designer: No existing designer/text overlay UI. InlineTextPopup exists for script text. SyncPoints support annotation text. TrackType includes 'overlay' but unused.
codebase_context.types: Segment has sourceOffset, SyncPoint has coordinates and annotationText. Timeline has tracks with TrackType enum.
